idea-plugin.name: SQLAlchemy Templates
idea-plugin.description:
Productivity toolkit for SQLAlchemy development in PyCharm and IntelliJ IDEA.

The plugin provides ready-to-use templates and code generation helpers for modern SQLAlchemy 2.0 projects.

Features

  • File templates for SQLAlchemy models
  • Live templates for columns, relationships, and common ORM patterns
  • SQLAlchemy model generation actions
  • SQLAlchemy 2.0 style with Mapped[] and mapped_column()

Included Templates

  • Declarative model template
  • Column snippets
  • Relationship snippets
  • Common SQLAlchemy boilerplate

Designed to reduce repetitive typing and help maintain consistent SQLAlchemy code across projects.
